n: An Egg! A Single Egg! One Egg!

steps.t: Ezôti has asked you to find and paint a rock that looks reasonably like a roc egg. Search for a suitable rock outside the Gate of Songs in the north-e…
You have inspected some rocks that did not fit the requirement. Inspect one last rock outside the gates of Umbar Baharbêl.
You have found the perfect sized rock. Now to paint it so it looks like a roc's egg. Paint the rock outside the gates of Umbar Baharbêl.
You have painted a rock to look like a roc's egg. It's time to deliver it back to Ezôti. Deliver the fake roc's egg to Ezôti in the Upper Ward of Umba…
You have delivered the 'egg' to Ezôti. Report back to Ezôti in the Upper Ward.
